examples.title: Algorithm: Initialize Swing JButton
examples.description: Steps to create a basic Swing application with JButton
examples.code:
ALGORITHM InitializeSwingButton
BEGIN
 Create JFrame instance
 Set frame layout to FlowLayout
 Create JButton with text "Click Me"
 Add button to frame's content pane
 Set frame size and visibility
END
examples.explanation:
1. JFrame creates main window
2. FlowLayout arranges components linearly
3. JButton with label initialized
4. Button added to frame's content pane
5. Frame configured for visibility

examples.title: Event Handling with JButton
examples.description: Create button that shows message dialog on click
examples.explanation:
1. Import Swing and AWT event packages
2. Create JFrame and JButton
3. Add anonymous ActionListener to button
4. Show message dialog on button click
5. Configure and display frame

examples.title: JButton with Icon and Tooltip
examples.description: Create a button with image icon and hover tooltip
examples.explanation:
1. Create ImageIcon from file
2. Initialize JButton with text and icon
3. Set tooltip for user guidance
4. Position text relative to icon
5. Display configured button
